credentialConfigId.description: Credential config ID to resolve and upload its schema content. When set, uri can be omitted and is resolved server-side.

format.description: Attestation format this schema URI applies to (e.g. dc+sd-jwt, mso_mdoc)

uri.description: URI pointing to the schema document for this format

metadata.description: Schema-format specific metadata (for example { vct: 'urn:example:vct' } for dc+sd-jwt).
